title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 454.402 - Equipment purchased by county for support enforcement to be property of county
text:
454.402.  Equipment purchased by county for support enforcement to be property of county. — The provisions of law, rule or regulation notwithstanding, any equipment purchased by a county of this state for child support enforcement purposes shall be the property of the county and not the state.
(L. 1986 H.B. 1479 § 4)
